description: This Python module provides utility functions for configuration management in a backend application. It includes functions to retrieve database URL, JWT secret, token expiration time, and upload directory from environment variables, with default values or error handling as needed.

methods.name: str get_database_url()
methods.description: Returns the SQLAlchemy-compatible database URL, determining order of environment variable preference and normalizing the URL if using PostgreSQL.

methods.name: str get_jwt_secret()
methods.description: Retrieves the JWT signing secret from environment variables, raising an error if not set.

methods.name: int get_access_token_exp_minutes()
methods.description: Retrieves access token expiry duration in minutes from environment variables, defaulting to 60, with minimum enforced value of 5.

methods.name: str get_upload_dir()
methods.description: Returns the directory path for storing uploaded inspection photos, defaulting to './uploads'.
